channel.title: Rail on adoption curve dot net
channel.description: Recent content in Rail on adoption curve dot net

item.title: National Express miss the Cluetrain
item.description: I’m a regular rail traveller on the East Coast Main Line, so when news of “innovative customer management technology” being deployed by operator National Express arrived in my inbox, I had to take a look. According to the press-release-masquerading-as-a-news-article in Computing magazine, “Maintaining passenger loyalty while reducing operational costs has become an urgent priority… …Consequently National Express is introducing an innovative text message analysis service. the new system captures passenger feedback by SMS, providing executives with a realtime view of company performance and service requirements.
